planSummary: Manual QA of /coupons list + create/edit/delete pages.
runSummary: Chrome DevTools MCP session on localhost:5103 with empty seed.

cases.text: Navigate to /coupons. Expect 200, StatsGrid (4 cards: total/active/inactive/expired), FilterBar, DataTable.

cases.summary: Create form — empty submit shows Arabic validation
cases.text: Click 'إنشاء الكوبون' on empty form. Expect Arabic errors. Observed: 'يجب ألا يقل عن 3 حرفاً' on code.

cases.summary: Create form — POST succeeds with valid payload
cases.text: Fill code='QATEST20', discountType=percentage, discountValue=20, minAmount=100 SAR, maxUses=50. Submit. Expect 201 + redirect. Observed: POST 400 — backend rejects 'minAmount' (expects 'minOrderAmt') and wants discountType uppercase 'PERCENTAGE' not 'percentage'. Frontend/backend schema mismatch.

cases.summary: Create/Edit form card headings render section titles
cases.text: Inspect h2 headings on form cards. Expect titles like 'الكود والخصم', 'الاستخدام والانتهاء', 'الوصف'. Observed: h2s render first field's label ('الكود', 'أقصى استخدام', 'الوصف (EN)') — same SectionHeader misuse as the branches bug.
